posts.author: GeorgeKonstam (George Konstam)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I want to make a Workflow for boards that aren’t yet built, but I cannot do this as a specific board has to be chosen in Workflows. I want the option to add in “Board ID Step 1” for example so I can then trigger certain actions off the back on my newly created Boards

What are you trying to achieve

More effective workflows by being able to better manipulate new Boards upon creation
